series_metadata.series_description: Policy and procedure manuals for each section, including but not limited to procedures for managing the section, sample letters, supporting documents, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy, review by State Archivist, then destroy. Retain existing offsite files for 75 years, unless needed for longer period of time based upon legal or administrative significance or scanned to electronic medium for storage. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then reviewed by State Archvist., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
